mapper.update: UPDATE file_meta SET tags = ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE WHEN (t#>>'{}')::bigint = #{oldId} THEN #{newId}::jsonb ELSE t END ) FROM jsonb_array_elements(tags) AS t ) WHERE tags @> CAST(#{oldId} AS TEXT)::jsonb
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_meta (id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, tags, metadata, created_at) VALUES ( #{id}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{tags}::jsonb, #{metadata}::jsonb, #{createdAt} )
